chunks.text: Expression Demo Expression Evaluation The slow signal is a ramp that starts at zero and increments by PI/100 on each firing. The fast signal is a ramp that starts at zero and increments by PI/10 on each firing. Try changing the expression in the box

ch firing. Try changing the expression in the box to "cos(slow)*cos(fast)" and clicking on the "Go" button. Other interesting alternatives include: "cos(fast*cos(slow))" "0.2*slow + cos(fast)" For more information about the Ptolemy Expression languag
e information about the Ptolemy Expression language, see the Expression Language Documentation
